ref_own_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

combo.resign_combo: select resign_cause_name as item_code ,resign_cause_code||' - '||resign_cause_name as item_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where 1 = 1

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as member_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as coll_member_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)as Thai_loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd MONTH yyyy')as begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sysdate , 'YYYY' ) as sysdate_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!Tday_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as Tday, '!book_no_1!' as book_no, '!day_1!' as day, '!resign!' as resign, (select sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_coll_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_coll_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' OR sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status is null) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = '12320' )
